name: Danish Meat Balls (Frikadeller)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine veal and pork in a bowl.
2. Grind the mixture 4-5 times through a meat grinder.
3. Add flour or bread crumbs, milk, egg, onion, salt, and pepper to the ground meat.
4. Mix all ingredients thoroughly until well combined.
5. Form the mixture into small patties.
6. Heat a large frying pan over low heat.
7. Drop the meat patty batter into the hot frying pan using a spoon.
8. Cook the meatballs over low heat for several minutes on each side, or until they are browned and cooked through.
9. Serve with browned butter, potatoes, and stewed cabbage.
Note: This recipe was published in "Danish Cookery" by Suzanne, Andr. Fred. Host & Son, Copenhagen, 1957.
